title: ToolTreaux Chainsaw Sharpener Burr Sanding File Hardware Tool 120 - 150 Grit
description:
The ToolTreaux sharpening burr was designed to be used with chainsaw blades and can be applied instead of a standard blade to keep your chainsaw blade as sharp as possible. By using a sharpener burr regularly, you can ensure a long-lasting service life for your chainsaw! In addition to keeping your chainsaw blades sharp, sharpening burrs grinding stones are great for a bunch of different hobby crafts and woodworking projects. You can use them for polishing jade, wood, blades, molds, and steel. These particular burrs are ideal for polishing metal after heat treatment. Our chainsaw sharpening burr is made of durable, high-quality steel that won’t rust and will last longer than a traditional sharpener burr

ToolTreaux Chainsaw Sharpener Burr Sanding File Hardware Tool 120 - 150 Grit

The ToolTreaux sharpening burr was designed to be used with chainsaw blades and can be applied instead of a standard blade to keep your chainsaw blade as sharp as possible. By using a sharpener burr regularly, you can ensure a long-lasting service life for your chainsaw!

Key Features

  • CHAINSAW SANDING BURR - ToolTreaux sharpening burr is designed for use with chainsaw blades and can be applied instead of a standard blade to keep the chain blade sharp. Ensure long-lasting blade life for your chainsaw blades!
  • VERSATILE SHARPENING TOOL - Sharpening burr grinding stone files are great for a myriad of hobby crafts and woodworking. Use them for polishing blades, jade, wood, molds, and steel. Ideal for polishing metal, especially steel parts after heat treatment
  • STURDY CONSTRUCTION - Chainsaw burr is made from high-quality, durable steel that will last longer than a traditional sharpener. Count on it for hardware projects, crafts, hobbies and professional applications
  • FINE GRIT - ToolTreaux sanding burr is rated as 120 grit, ideal for fine abrasive applications. These grits will create smoother surface finishes, rather than coarser abrasives that scrape off materials quickly. Comes with a clear plastic storage tube.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Grinding length: 1.75”; Head diameter: 3/18”; Shank size: 1/8“; Grit size: 120 (fine abrasive); Colors: chrome, clear, blue; Materials: steel, plastic; Storage case included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TTSANDGRDT1
  • UPC: 810058483188
  • Color: Silver

In addition to keeping your chainsaw blades sharp, sharpening burrs grinding stones are great for a bunch of different hobby crafts and woodworking projects. You can use them for polishing jade, wood, blades, molds, and steel. These particular burrs are ideal for polishing metal after heat treatment.

Our chainsaw sharpening burr is made of durable, high-quality steel that won’t rust and will last longer than a traditional sharpener burr. You can count on it for a myriad of hardware projects, hobbies, crafts, and professional applications.

This sanding burr has a 120 grit rating which is ideal for fine abrasive applications. These higher-rated grits create smoother surface finishes than coarser abrasives that scrape off materials quickly. The burr comes with a convenient plastic storage tube to keep it safe and secure when not in use.
